finance.title: Companies spending the most on AI are growing jobs, Ramp study finds
finance.blurb: A new study from Ramp found companies making the biggest investments in AI are expanding their workforces, with heavy adopters increasing headcount by about 10% and entry-level hiring by 12%, challenging fears that generative AI is already causing widespread job losses.
